title: hieracium sparsum subsp. subvillosum
intro: Hieracium sparsum subsp. subvillosum is a lesser-known species of the Hieracium genus, commonly referred to as hawkweed, which is a type of flowering plant known for its bright yellow or white flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing and reducing pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Hieracium sparsum subsp. subvillosum include its potential to reduce fever, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Hieracium sparsum subsp. subvillosum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
